channel.title: Virtualization on DevOpsTales
channel.description: Recent content in Virtualization on DevOpsTales

item.title: Proxmox Datacenter Manager: Complete Guide
item.description: Proxmox Datacenter Manager (PDM) is a centralized management platform for overseeing multiple Proxmox VE clusters and Proxmox Backup Server instances from a single interface. This guide covers installation, configuration, and best practices for managing your virtualization infrastructure at scale.
